title: PATIENT RELATIONS EXECUTIVE
description:
• Pleasant personality and positive attitude

  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills

  • Active listening skills

  • Able to explain things in a friendly and professional manner

  • Good telephone etiquette with pleasant voice

  • Caring, helpful and supportive by nature

  • Strong sense of responsibility and ability to do what it takes

  • Meticulous, systematic and well-organized

  • Proactive, flexible, versatile, adaptive to change with can-do attitude

  • Good computer knowledge

  • Ability to set priorities and multitask well in a fast paced environment

  • Able to commit to 5• days• of variable shift work

  • Minimum Diploma / Bachelor Degree in any discipline

Job Responsibilities:

  • A keen and resourceful learner to understand more about dental knowledge, able to explain dental treatment procedures and oral home care instruction to our patients

  • Attend to all patients' enquiries in a timely and professional manner

  • Service excellence

  • Manage appointments and schedule for all clinicians

  • Be our brand ambassador and build good relationship with patients

  • Make follow up calls and handle treatment coordinating work

  • Provide clinicians and patients administrative support

  • Educate patients on our dental philosophy and treatment

  • Use Patient Management System and office software efficiently

  • Come up with new ideas and proposals for improvement projects

  • Actively take part in enhancing overall patient service experience

  • Initiate or participate in improvement projects to increase work efficiency and productivity

postedCompany.description: We are a progressive and technologically-advanced dental practice located in Heartland Mall (Kovan MRT) and Scotts Medical (Orchard MRT). We currently have a positive and dynamic team of 30 members and we are still seeking for more committed individuals to join our passionate and patient-centered team. We are well equipped with the latest dental technology and experienced clinicians to provide a full range of comprehensive advanced dental treatments to our patients. We are an established SME that operates professionally like an MNC company in a friendly and family-like working environment.
postedCompany.name: DP DENTAL PTE. LTD.
